title: OzzyBot Signal Payload
description: Contract between Hermes SMC Pro (TradingView) and OzzyBot webhook. Versioned. Any change requires updating both Pine Script and this schema.

secret.description: Webhook authentication secret. Validated separately by auth logic; included in schema to prevent additionalProperties rejection.

symbol.description: TradingView ticker symbol. Must match a key in config.ASSETS.

timeframe.description: Chart timeframe that fired the alert.

timestamp.description: Unix time of the signal bar: seconds (10 digits) or milliseconds (13 digits). Range validated in request_utils.validate_signal_payload().

version.description: Pine Script version that emitted this payload.

offset.description: ATR multiplier used for entry offset.

source_service.description: Source service or scanner that emitted the signal; used for lane routing.

strategy_label.description: Stable strategy lane label; used for lane routing.

entry_setup_label.description: Entry setup label; used for lane routing.

regime_label.description: Stable regime label used for analytics.

webhook_port.description: Local webhook port selected by the signal source.

execution_mode.description: Execution environment selected by the signal source.

session.description: Kill zone session at signal bar.

strategy.description: Pine Script strategy that triggered the signal (v2.1.1).

sl.description: Suggested stop-loss price from Pine Script.

tp.description: Suggested take-profit price from Pine Script.

$comment: If you need to add a new field, update this schema, the Pine Script, and the webhook parser. Never allow additionalProperties silently — it hides contract drift.
